implementation_drift_gate: implementation_drift allowed only when passed==true (every required_for_implementation_drift item equated). Otherwise only same | config_drift | undefined | harness_error.
notes: Partial lab evidence for P-TOKEN-SHAPE-v0 on itl-lab. Not a generalization about IdPs.

items.observable: OAuth grant_type used in the token request
items.how_checked: Read lab_environment.grant on each redacted fixture; must equal request used by capture scripts

items.observable: scope string sent on the token request / returned scope field
items.how_checked: Capture scripts set scope=openid profile email; confirm body.scope tokens cover the same three names (order-insensitive)
Field extraction v0: compare artifacts/*/expires_in (or fixture body.expires_in)
items.threshold: integer equality (no tolerance on this pin)
items.notes: Defaults not retuned before capture → config_drift on token_lifetime_expires_in

items.observable: Whether a refresh_token string was returned
items.notes: Presence only; refresh lifetime/rotation not measured on this profile

items.how_checked: Not exercised by P-TOKEN-SHAPE-v0 (belongs to P-REFRESH-REUSE-v0)
items.notes: equated=true only because both sides are n/a for this profile — not a claim that rotation matches

items.how_checked: N/A for resource_owner_password; profile.client.pkce == false on both

items.observable: Whether access_token parses as JWT (three base64url segments)
items.notes: Product defaults not equated → config_drift on access_token_is_jwt

items.observable: Whether id_token claim-key set includes email and preferred_username (or name) after requesting profile+email scopes
items.how_checked: Field extraction v0: membership of email in claim_keys_id (minimal proxy for claim-mapping equivalence on this pin)
items.notes: Not a full claim ontology; sufficient to block implementation_drift on claim-set rows

items.observable: HTTP client library used by both drivers
items.how_checked: Code review of capture scripts (both Python urllib)

items.observable: Configured clock-skew / time sync between IdP containers
items.how_checked: Not instrumented on this pin (no chrony probe recorded)
items.threshold: both unset → equated=false for drift gate if a row depended on wall-clock; this pin's rows do not
items.notes: Recorded as not checked. Does not unlock implementation_drift.
